◎简　　介  

　　Are you ready to watch a love story full of adrenaline? Ese, a biker who wants to be the regional champion, and Deniz, who believes that she'll be taken away from the world by the UFOs one day, are two teenagers living totally different lives in Adana. With their youthful thrill, Deniz and Ese fall in love with one another. This great love brings two different worlds together. ...
